welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.lead: Einbürgerungstest — the official test for obtaining German citizenship.
welcome.about_body: The Einbürgerungstest is the official test required by the German government for anyone applying for German citizenship. It has 33 multiple-choice questions (30 general + 3 specific to the state where you live), and you need at least 17 correct answers to pass. This app covers all 310 questions of the official catalog for the state of Bavaria.
welcome.about_modes: Use Lernmodus (study mode) to take your time with translations, or Prüfungsmodus (exam mode) to simulate the real test (60 min, no translations).
welcome.choose_lang_hint: The questions always stay in German. This selects the translation language. You can change it anytime in the top-right corner.
welcome.choose_state_hint: Click your state on the map. The state-specific questions will adapt to your choice.

home.subtitle: Practice for the German citizenship test — Bavaria.
home.mode_study_body: Browse all 310 questions freely. Click any word to see the translation. Whole-question translation also available.
home.mode_exam_body: Real exam simulation: 33 random questions (30 general + 3 Bavaria), 60 minutes, German only. Pass with 17 or more correct answers.
home.favorites_subtitle: Click a card to see the question again.
home.glossary_hint: Words you click in study mode are saved here — even after reload.

quiz.confirm_abort: Really cancel the exam? Your progress will be lost.
quiz.glossary_hint: Click a word to save it here.

auth.register_lead: Get full access for €10 / year. You can also create the account now and pay later.
auth.welcome_status: Your account has been created. Status: Awaiting payment.
auth.welcome_body: Please complete the payment to unlock all 310 questions.
auth.pay_hint: Payment is processed through Stripe (PayPal, card, SEPA). Activation is automatic.
auth.account_pw_success: ✓ Password changed. Other devices have been signed out.

paywall.body_limit: You've used your {limit} free questions. Create an account for full access.
paywall.body_pending: Your account is created but not yet activated. Complete the payment to continue learning.

payment_return.success_body: Your account is now active. You have full access to all 310 questions for 1 year.
payment_return.pending_body: We're waiting for the bank to confirm. Card and PayPal usually take seconds; SEPA can take a few business days. As soon as the payment is confirmed, your account will be activated automatically.
payment_return.cancel_body: No problem — you can come back any time and complete the payment.

errors.password_too_common: Password is too common — please choose a safer one.
errors.password_unchanged: The new password must be different from the old one.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.stripe_not_configured: Payment temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.checkout_failed: Could not start the payment. Please try again later or contact us via the contact form.

tour.step_welcome_body: Quick tour of the app — about 1 minute. You can skip anytime.
tour.step_lernmodus_body: Browse all 310 questions with translations and word definitions.
tour.step_pruefungsmodus_body: 33 random questions, 60 minutes, German only — like the real test.
tour.step_progress_body: Track your learning progress here — updated automatically as you study.
tour.step_wortschatz_body: Click any word in study mode — it gets saved here, even after reload.
tour.step_favorites_body: While studying, mark any question with the star (☆) — it appears here on the home screen.
tour.step_favorites_study_body: This button lets you drill only your starred questions — perfect for the last days before the exam.
tour.step_trial_body: You have 15 free questions. After that, you'll need an account.
tour.step_account_body: Create an account for full access — €10/year, all 310 questions, all modes.
tour.step_language_body: Pick your helper language here — questions stay in German.
tour.step_done_body: You can replay this tour anytime — “Tour” button top-right. Good luck!

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.lead: Have a question, bug or suggestion? Send a message — we'll reply by email as soon as we can.
contact.name: Name
contact.failed: Could not send. Please try again later.
